title: poa glauca var. debilis
intro: Poa glauca var. debilis, also known as Blue Grass or Blue Grama Grass, is a type of grass native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, and is a variant of the Poa glauca species. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Poa glauca var. debilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
